category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Shimmy as an OpenAI-compatible local LLM inference server.
source_facts.description says it is a small local inference server with OpenAI-compatible GGUF endpoints.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Shimmy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository includes a docs/ directory and README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics/README indicate Rust, local AI, inference server, and command-line usage.
source_facts.description identifies local inference, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, and GGUF support.
